findings: The draft is concise and bounded, but it reads as a methods note rather than a complete article.
The manuscript needs stronger article framing, figures, tables, and a linked results/discussion package.
required_fixes: Expand into the journal-targeted manuscript after protocol and results tracks complete.
Add figure, table, and supplement callouts tied to generated assets.
residual_risks: Journal fit cannot be scored above threshold until a target journal is selected.
